transcript: AI: Tum college gaye the? [Did you go to college?] Human: Yes, I passed out in 2022. AI: Passed out nahi, graduated hota hai. [Not passed out, it's graduated.] Human: Kya? [What?] AI: Are, passed out ka matlab behosh hona hota hai. 'I graduated' hota hai jab tumne college complete kar li. [Oh, passed out means to faint. It's 'I graduated' when you have completed college.] Human: Oh... theek hai, mujhe English acche se nahi aati. [Oh... okay, I don't know English very well.] AI: Are, AI teachers try kiya? [Oh, did you try AI teachers?] Human: Woh toh mahenge hote honge na? [They must be expensive, right?] AI: Bilkul nahi! Normal English classes se 7 guna sasta hai. Isliye 50 lakh log MySivi par English practice kar rahe hain. [Not at all! It's 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing English on MySivi.] Human: Par time nahi milta. [But I don't get time.] AI: Roz ki sirf 15-20 minute ki practice kaafi hai. Bilkul confident ho jaoge. [Just 15-20 minutes of daily practice is enough. You will become completely confident.] Human: Wow! Kaise join karun? [Wow! How do I join?] AI: Yeh install ka button dabao aur MySivi app install karo. Sign up karo aur practice start karo. Sirf 15 dinon mein tumhe improvement dikhne lagegi. Chalo shuru ho jao. [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. Sign up and start practicing. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Come on, get started.]
on_screen_text: Tum college gaye the? [Did you go to college?] / I passed out in 2022. / Passed out nahi [Not passed out] / graduated hota hai [it is graduated] / Kya? [What?] / matlab behosh hona [means to faint] / I graduated / college complete / English acche se [English well] / AI teachers / mahenge [expensive] / Bilkul nahi! [Not at all!] / 7 guna sasta [7 times cheaper] / 50 lakh [5 million] / MySivi / English practice / time nahi milta [don't get time] / Roz ki sirf 15-20 [Just 15-20 daily] / kaafi hai [is enough] / confident / Kaise join karun? [How to join?] / install ka [of install] / MySivi app / install karo [install] / practice start / Sirf 15 dinon [Just 15 days] / improvement
summary: An AI avatar corrects a young man's English grammar during a video call, explaining the difference between 'passed out' and 'graduated.' She then introduces the MySivi app as an affordable, time-efficient way to practice English with AI teachers. The ad concludes with a call to action to install the app and start practicing.
